programme.desc: Wichita residents live in fear that they will be a killer's next victim.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting
programme.desc: For years the BTK killer plays a cat and mouse game with law enforcement and the media taunting them as he seeks the attention he craves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cedar Log Peeler

programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group, and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 2

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Matter of Life or Seth

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: British Invasion
programme.desc: The guys cross the pond for the first-ever international episode of Impractical Jokers. Joe, Murr, Q and Sal may be up to their old tricks, but the clueless people on the receiving end of the those tricks won't be the typical 'marks' they're used to.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No. Holds. Barred
programme.desc: It's getting hot and heavy as powerlifting besties battle a couple whose on and off status is ever evolving.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Half Baked
programme.desc: From homemade haircuts, to guys rebooting their computer with a baseball bat, we've got the still-frozen-on-the-inside microwave burritos of humanity.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Down But Not Out
programme.desc: From snack-stealing monkeys and fighting grandmas, to a guy solving Rubik's cubes in a speedo, these people won't win, but they'll go down swinging.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: The Hack House
programme.desc: The car engine that works best for cooking salmon; the celebrity that taunts her co-stars with bad breath.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hack the Unexpected
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin put their hacking skills to the test as they find out which hacks work best for popping popcorn and polishing silverware. Plus, they’ll uncover the best hacks for working out and using dental floss.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks
programme.desc: Find out what country gives huge fines for chewing gum, how long you can survive without water in a zombie apocalypse, and which one of our hacks was the most expensive to make.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hack-a-bye Baby
programme.desc: Find out which cop show had an influence on hack 911, what early ice skates were made out of, which old wives' tale is actually true, and which hack Kevin and Brooke thought was a prank.

programme.title: Movie: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: A young man from South Central Los Angeles must recover stolen money from a fraternity.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 4
programme.desc: A crack dealer on the lam, a high-speed chase on the runway, a would-be tornado chaser on the hunt, stunt bikers on the pavement and some of the worst road rage you've ever seen.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 6
programme.desc: 20 real-life video clips of dopes driving dangerously for your amusement, including a thief in a hijacked backhoe, a trucker using Flintstone-style technology, and an Amish buggy driver who couldn't care less about the rules of the road.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Outlaws
programme.desc: These 20 idiotic scoff-laws include a pair of stoned would-be thieves in a head shop, a dimwit robber in a Darth Vader mask and a jewel thief whose get-away vehicle is a wheelchair.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Outlaws 2
programme.desc: Some of the stupidest criminals ever include a nearly-naked burglar, a bad break-in artist and a crazy plot to steal sheep.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Good, the Bad and the Punished
programme.desc: The guys pose as cranky NY cab drivers, then solicit undeserved congrats in the park. Then, tonight's loser is sheriff of an old Nevada town.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.desc: Working together in our virtual call center, Nene Leakes, Alyssa Milano and Bob Harper field phone calls and speak to real people seeking their advice and answers to their most burning questions.

programme.desc: Working together in our virtual call center, Vivica A Fox, Captain Lee, Johnny Weir and Stephanie Beatriz field phone calls and speak to real people seeking their advice and answers to their most burning questions.

programme.desc: Working together in our virtual call center, Todd Chrisley, Captain Sandy, Loni Love, Kandi Burruss-Tucker and Todd Tucker field phone calls and speak to real people seeking their advice and answers to their most burning questions.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Feisty Fiesta
programme.desc: It's a Frozen Food Feud for the first game as the chefs race to gather ingredients for a seafood dish. In the second game, the chefs get Guy's Grocery List and must incorporate all the ingredients, including soy sauce, into their Mexican dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Lunch and Brunch
programme.desc: On this road trip revisit, Guy Fieri pops by an Oklahoma City diner known for their onion burgers. Then, a Baltimore brunch spot is stepping up their grit game, and a quirky joint in Los Angeles is still putting a spin on their diner dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bite of Britain
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's livin' it up in London, digging into a real-deal regional feast. First, a couple of British buddies smoke up true blue American 'cue. Then, a hip hangout gives classic fish-n-chips a modern makeover.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Appeal
programme.desc: Guy's going on an international flavorfest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown Medley
programme.desc: A Memphis bar-turned-bistro offers low brow favourites; a food truck in Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homemade and Homebrewed
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's mixing' his love of home cooking with his appreciation of homebrew. In Chicago, Ill., a dive refines small plate Mexican with dishes like shiitake mushroom empanadas and flautas with homemade queso fresco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Vegas, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads off the Vegas strip, checks out a dive in Buffalo and a Bulgarian tapas joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos and Tots
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. In Denver, an old-time bar is going all-out homemade on tater tots, pork rinds and a monster pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Long Standing Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy finds a slice of history all over the country starting at Santa Barbara to Dallas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Joints
programme.desc: Guy visits a St. Louis tavern for German spaetzle, and Virginia for calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Al Fresco
programme.desc: Giada heads to Palm Springs with her daughter and her boyfriend for a weekend of fun in the sun. Giada makes them a poolside, al fresco feast with picnic pasta, make-your-own flank steak hoagies and almond butter brownies.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Guilt-Free Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay's brunch menu is so satisfying and delicious, you'd never know it's good for you too! His healthy menu includes a Blueberry-Pomegranate Power Bowl with Crispy Quinoa Crumbles, creamy and flavorful Avocado Toast.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: French to Make at Home
programme.desc: Ina has all the tricks for cooking French at home with secrets to a show.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Backyard Beach Party
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has enjoyed many wonderful summer meals on the shores of the Pacific, and she's welcoming the warm weather with an Italian-style backyard beach party with her family.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All in One
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making non-stop all-in-one wonders! There's a simple chicken and dressing sheet pan supper, lemon, basil and shrimp risotto in a skillet, the easiest ramen pho and a layered portable Greek salad in a jar.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes comfort food the easy way starting with carrot cake French toast, a tasty combo of two comforting classics in one make-ahead breakfast. There's also corn and green chili chowder made fast in a multi pot, a butterscotch lava cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Stanton and Paige
programme.desc: Ree's daughter and her friend request Chinese food for their sleepover dinner. Ree whips up cashew chicken, edamame fried rice and quick pan-fried kale. The next morning for breakfast its homemade granola for strawberry granola.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl's Brunch
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to her favourite brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. There's mini quiches with peas and bacon, garlicky lemony kale and a dark chocolate scone loaf with marzipan for a sweet treat.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Gives Back
programme.desc: After a morning spent at an adoption event for homeless animals, Valerie uses new and old family recipes to throw a sparkling cocktail party for her fellow volunteers.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Cali Brunch
programme.desc: Guy and his chef friends celebrate the Golden State with a Cali-inspired brunch spread. Eric Greenspan makes lemon ricotta pancakes, Aaron May prepares crab benedict and avocado salad and Carl Ruiz makes tallegio and asparagus paninis.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Meats and Sweets Feel the Heat
programme.desc: Only Michael Symon would think to make Moussaka on the grill, taking the Mediterranean casserole layered with meat, veggies and cheese sauce outside. His wife, Liz, joins him to create a light, complimentary side dish of grilled and steamed artichokes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: BBQ and A
programme.desc: The Kitchen answers all of your burning BBQ questions. Geoffrey Zakarian starts by sharing the best cut of steak for the grill with his Grilled Hanger Steaks with Roasted Garlic Romesco Sauce.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple G Redemption
programme.desc: Four chefs return to Flavortown for a second chance at the $20,000 Shopping Spree. But Guy Fieri doesn't make this trip any easier, as the four chefs make a redemption dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Whiz Kids
programme.desc: Four culinary whiz kids compete in this special kids edition of Guy's Grocery Games. First, the young chefs win a mandatory ingredient for an Italian dish using the first ever 'Groceryland' board game.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Kids
programme.desc: Kids take on Flavortown after Guy Fieri invites four bite-sized chefs to play two huge games.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter

programme.title: Movie: Flatliners
programme.desc: Five curious medical students trigger their own near-death experiences as part of an experiment to study and document the afterlife. As the experiments go further and further, their actions cross a threshold that the living were never meant to cross.

programme.title: Movie: World War Z
programme.desc: A UN employee traverses the world in race against time to stop the Zombie pandemic that is toppling governments and armies and threatening to destroy humanity itself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Star Is Burns
programme.desc: In order to boost Springfield's popularity, the town residents decide to hold a film festival and invite film critic Jay Sherman to take part in the jury.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Radioactive Man
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse both audition for the role of Fallout Boy in a new Radioactive Man movie, which will be filmed in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beyond Blunderdome

programme.title: The Simpsons: Co-Dependent's Day

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer and Ned's Hail Mary Pass

programme.title: The Simpsons: Any Given Sundance
programme.desc: When Lisa's documentary on her family premieres at the Sundance Film Festival, Homer, Marge and Bart are embarrassed by the candid behind-the-scenes look at their lives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Steal This Episode
programme.desc: Homer becomes annoyed with movie theatres, so Bart teaches him how to download movies illegally. Homer is delighted with his discovery of free movies until he's caught for piracy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Not Dead
programme.desc: Bart takes a dare, and ends up in the hospital. To cover for himself and Homer, he says he went to Heaven and met Jesus. Christian producers offer the Simpsons a movie deal, which Homer takes. But Bart can’t deal with the guilt and comes clean to Marge.

programme.desc: Revisit the most memorable scenes from Blue Planet II's seven episodes. Highlights include giant trevally that fly out of the water to snatch seabirds in mid-air and the industrious tuskfish who uses a coral anvil to crack open his clams.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fire for Freedom
programme.desc: Identical twins Caleb and Joshua are the apples of their father's eye, but the pressure to be exceptional manifests into dangerous hatred. Isolated from the world, their seclusion fuels a need to break free at any cost.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb

programme.title: Evil Twins: All-American Killers
programme.desc: Identical twins Roman and Ruslan Glukhoy are high school wrestling champions with a bright future in professional sports. But when a freak accident shatters their dreams, they follow a path to death and destruction with blood on their hands.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Lies or Alibis
programme.desc: Scott Davis' past caught up to him when he found himself on trial for murdering his estranged wife's new boyfriend 10 years earlier. Now his family has called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to investigate what they believe is a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Who Killed the Doctor?
programme.desc: A prominent Utica, New York doctor is struck by a mysterious illness and eventually dies from it. Detectives are able to prove her death is no accident, and the answer to who killed her lies in a milkshake.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: Who Killed Angie Dodge?
programme.desc: CeCe Moore investigates a 1996 murder case with the most degraded DNA sample ever used to identify a killer through genetic genealogy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Affair
programme.desc: After one partner in a marriage has an affair, the wife says she's moving forward. But with hidden back accounts, DNA testing kits and a gun, the woman is becoming unhinged. A deadly act of revenge leaves just one person to tell the tale.

programme.title: Who Killed the Doctor?
programme.desc: A prominent Utica, New York doctor is struck by a mysterious illness and eventually dies from it. Detectives are able to prove her death is no accident, and the answer to who killed her lies in a milkshake.

programme.title: The Genetic Detective: Who Killed Angie Dodge?
programme.desc: CeCe Moore investigates a 1996 murder case with the most degraded DNA sample ever used to identify a killer through genetic genealogy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri
programme.desc: A young mother vanishes while out jogging. A frantic search is mounted. Then, just as suddenly, three weeks later she reappears, battered and bruised and her long blond hair chopped off.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Hero or Killer?
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio in 1991, 15-year-old David Clark was convicted of setting a house on fire that killed a 12-year-old girl. Now, two of his sisters have called Chris and Fatima in to investigate and help them prove this was a wrongful conviction.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Chance Encounter
programme.desc: A night of partying by fraternity brothers ends with a knock on the door and gunfire. One student is dead, three are wounded, and a freshman freely admits he was the shooter. He claims it was self-defence. But others say he was looking for revenge.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Family Plot
programme.desc: Members of a Midwestern suburban family begin mysteriously dying off after weeks of flu-like symptoms. But after a third family member is hospitalized, authorities begin to believe something far more sinister is at work.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part One
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Killing on the Cape: Part Two
programme.desc: A former A-list writer is found murdered in her Cape Cod home. In the aftermath, rumours run rampant as a tangled web of relationships is revealed. Nothing would prepare the community for the shock of who was arrested, and the stunning claim he made.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick
programme.desc: Donna Fontaine and her boyfriend Fred Palahniuk are found shot dead in a burning building in remote Kendrick, Idaho. A conspiracy of silence protects the killer until his lovers crack and confess the damning evidence needed to convict him.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Married couple Doug and Rozina Anderson's decision to take a long weekend in the peaceful woods of Northern California turns out to be a fateful mistake.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Fatal Friendship
programme.desc: When recent high school graduate Stephanie Neiman gives her friend Summer Hair a ride in small town Oklahoma, what starts out as a favor quickly becomes a struggle to survive.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Strange Passenger
programme.desc: In May 2000, friends Liz Reiser and Brandi Hicks go to a video store in the quaint Ohio town of New Philadelphia. Their plans for an innocent movie night morph into a true-life horror film when they give a ride to a stranger in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Sam Giancana
programme.desc: Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein

programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Sam Giancana
programme.desc: Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Rebuilding The Old Schoolhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of Cabin Masters hike through the woods of Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated family camp that was once the old schoolhouse. A serious case of rot threatens to close down the entire project.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The Flying Carpet Chair
programme.desc: Instead of waiting for the good finds to come to them, Don and Hal head out to go picking at a bat-infested barn north of town. There, they manage to grab a vintage tire rack and some Victorian roof cresting.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Triples Infinity Edge
programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Tiers
programme.desc: A Texas couple building their dream home wants a pool with one-of-a-kind architecture that's also kid-friendly for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" this classic episode with a surprising new cheeseburger procedure and the "lost" ground meat dish the food sensors nixed back in '99.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" a classic biscuit show featuring his grandmother, with an entirely new take on the classic quick bread.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Yang
programme.desc: Seattle based chef Rachel Yang enters Kitchen Stadium to take on the winner of Iron Chief.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Cora vs. Smith
programme.desc: Chef Holy Smith's Northern Italian cuisine competes against Chef Cora's Mediterranean.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Tournament of Champions: Flay vs. Smith
programme.desc: Canadian TV personality and chef, Michael Smith, enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Bobby Flay. Smith prides himself on his organic and local produce and doesn't disappoint by bringing that to Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Wadi
programme.desc: Minneapolis based chef Sameh Wadi enters Kitchen Stadium for an exciting battle against Iron Chef Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Ultimate Bar Food: Flay/ Anderson vs. Morimoto/ Majumdar
programme.desc: Iron chefs are paired with amateur cooks to raise the bar on common food fare. It's Chef Bobby Flay and Anthony Anderson versus Chef Masaharu Morimoto and Simon Majumdar.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Yagihashi
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon faces off against challenger Takashi Yagihashi.

programme.desc: Fruit is almost made sinful again with decadent desserts, fruit galette or chic tart.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Treats in NYC
programme.desc: We're on the hunt for the best sweet treats New York City has to offer. Sweets by Chloe is a cute vegan bakeshop that's creating giant cookies and fudge cakes that are rich and moist, creamy and chocolatey.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: L.A. Decadence
programme.desc: Uncover the most unique Sweet spots in L.A.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Sandwiches
programme.desc: It's that perfect little dessert that you can hold in your hands.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Four bakers compete to impress the directors of the movie, Alessandro Carloni and Jennifer Yuh Nelson, with their cake creations.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship: Life With Molly Yeh
programme.desc: Gender reveal cupcakes are all the rage, so Food Network host and new mom Molly Yeh challenges four top cupcake designers to create their best revealing design.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Manila
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Manila's iconic foods, from slow roasted pork to chicken inasal.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City has the most people of any city in the western hemisphere, and they all love to eat. Home to some of the best street food on Earth, Andrew Zimmern explores tasty traditions like barbacoa, chicharrone and huarache.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chicken Poofs/ Stupid Cupid
programme.desc: Poof gets the chicken poofs and turns everyone into chickens; Timmy takes Cupid's arrows.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores
programme.desc: Dad takes Timmy to his office on Bring Your Kids to Work Day. Also, Timmy is talented at soccer.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Vicky Loses Her Icky/ Pixies Inc.
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Vicky to be nice; the anti-fun Pixies take over Fairyworld.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Old Man and the C/ Balance of Flour
programme.desc: Dad admits he dropped out of school in grade 5 and joins Timmy's class.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Old Parent
programme.desc: Poof finally becomes a fairy godparent. Unfortunately, it's to Mrs. Crocker.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Smart Lair/Hot Soup: The Game
programme.desc: Donnie's new invention takes over the Lair. Then, Mikey goes on a mission to retrieve a Lou Jitsu video game.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Bug Busters
programme.desc: The Turtles look for a way to eliminate New York City's oozesquito problem.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hand-Me-Downer/ Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob loves Krabby Patties so much, he just can't help singing and dancing when he's around the delicious sandwiches.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Plan 10
programme.desc: Ralph's hot-headed impulsiveness lands him in deep trouble when he accidentally damages a machine that forces him to switch minds with a Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Vengeance is Mine
programme.desc: Leo goes behind Splinter's back when he stages a rescue for Karai, whose desire for revenge against Shredder brings about grave consequences for all.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: A Chinatown Ghost Story
programme.desc: As Donnie becomes increasingly jealous of April and Casey's relationship, April is kidnapped by an evil spirit that intends to drain her powers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Into Dimension X!
programme.desc: At home, Mikey always messes things up, but when the Turtles go to the bizarre realm of Dimension X, he's the only one who can figure the place out.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Secret Exhibit
programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Secret Exhibit
programme.desc: From hang gliding with a Pteranodon to a high-speed game of chicken with a T-Rex, Owen and Claire are determined to deliver the dinosaurs to the new exhibit on time, but park worker Danny Nedermeyer has other plans for the duo and Jurassic World.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: Movie: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: The Smurfs team up with human friends to save Smurfette, who has been kidnapped by Gargamel because she knows a secret spell.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Balloons of Doom
programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Danger Games
programme.desc: Frustrated by his failed villainy, Dr. Minyak plans to ruin Double G's worldwide charity concert. Captain Man and Kid Danger join forces with the Game Shakers to defeat Dr. Minyak and keep Double G safe.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Four Supes and a Baby
programme.desc: Phoebe drags Billy and Nora to the park to meet her crush and his baby brother, but when Max takes the younger kids home, they accidentally grab the real-life baby instead of Nora's doll.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Cheer and Present Danger
programme.desc: When only one of them makes the cheerleading squad, Phoebe and Cherry's friendship is tested. Max wins a month of free pizza and has to convince his family that he didn't cheat.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Thunder Van
programme.desc: Hank brings the Thundervan back from Metroburg for Phoebe to continue her superhero training, but when the kids sneak in to the van for an unauthorized joyride, Hank gives them a ride they will never forget.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Change of Art
programme.desc: Phoebe gets Billy's help with an art project only to find he took the piece from a museum.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Corgi Rock Party!
programme.desc: Host Jay Pharoah introduces two mystery celebs hiding behind 3D animated filters. Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green and Lex Lumpkin ask questions and gather clues to unveil our special guests.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: Special guest Frankie Grande stops by Coffee, Coffee, Coffee, T@$Hle!gh goes to the school pep rally, All That presents a new way to cool lasagna with the Lasagna Cooler, and Aria finds a new "thing."

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome Home, Father Roach
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Sparkle Fight
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Trials of the Darksaber
programme.desc: To help recruit her people to join the rebels, Sabine reluctantly agrees to learn to wield an ancient Mandalorian weapon but finds the challenge more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Legacy of Mandalore
programme.desc: Hoping to enlist her family to help the rebels, Sabine returns to her home world with Kanan and Ezra but soon finds herself embroiled in her family's power struggle for Mandalore.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Zero Hour
programme.desc: In final preparations for their attack on Lothal, Phoenix Squadron's plans are disrupted when Grand Admiral Thrawn discovers their location.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Zero Hour
programme.desc: Trapped on Atollon with the rebel base under siege, Hera and Kanan fight to keep the squadron alive as Ezra attempts to rally help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Heroes of Mandalore: Part 1
programme.desc: Sabine leads Ezra, Kanan and an army of her fellow Mandalorians back to her home world to rescue her father from the clutches of the Empire.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Heroes of Mandalore: Part 2
programme.desc: When Sabine discovers the Empire has resurrected a devastating weapon she created and plans to use it against her people, she must decide whether to destroy it or use it herself.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!

programme.desc: When a reporter comes over to do a feature on the Ricardos, Lucy trashes the apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Fur Coat
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a mink coat that is to be used in his act but Lucy thinks it's for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: A woman is a final contestant on a dating show and faces off against her high-school sweetheart during the 'Hometown Date.'

programme.title: Movie: June in January
programme.desc: Every January, June goes through post-holiday blues and Alex surprises her.

programme.title: Movie: Yes, I Do
programme.desc: A busy chocolatier has left her helicopter mechanic at the altar three times and now she needs to prove to him that she really does want to marry him.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: Get Hard
programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat

programme.title: The Closer: Saving Face
programme.desc: At a retired cop's funeral, Provenza and Flynn discover something unexpected in the coffin.

programme.title: The Closer: Ruby
programme.desc: A recently released sex offender is accused of kidnapping a child, and with time running out, Det. Gabriel goes too far. Deputy Chief Johnson must deal with Gabriel and also get the pedophile to confess.

programme.title: The Closer: The Round File
programme.desc: An old man's confession to seven murders leads Deputy Chief Johnson to investigate the sudden deaths at his nursing home.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Imitation Game
programme.desc: The murder of a notorious thief sends Jane and Maura into the world of art heists and forgery, and forces Jane to tango with an FBI agent who has a keen interest in her case. There's also a new man in Angela's life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Misconduct Game
programme.desc: The murder of a crime tech sends shockwaves throughout the team. When suspicions arise that the tech had tampered with evidence for BPD cases, Maura is suspended from her position. Jane is determined to catch the killer and clear the department.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Deadly Harvest
programme.desc: Jane and Maura are called out to the BCU 'body farm' (an academic research facility dedicated to the study of human decomposition) when a murder victim is found buried in a shallow grave among the research corpses.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Kung Fu Fighting
programme.desc: With his marriage in turmoil, the Chief turns to his fellow male surgeons for a gentlemen's evening. Cristina and Izzie heatedly compete for the same surgeries and Meredith treats the victim of a sky diving accident.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Physical Attraction...Chemical Reaction
programme.desc: George and Izzie's romantic chemistry is put to the test; Derek asks for more from Meredith; Mark develops a crush on a fellow surgeon and Callie's role as Chief Resident is placed in jeopardy after she delegates much of her job to Bailey.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Forever Young
programme.desc: After a tragic school bus crash, the hospital is flooded with teenage patients. Meanwhile, Bailey treats a patient who was her high school crush, Derek dates a fellow doctor, and Thatcher arrives at the ER looking for Meredith.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made
programme.desc: A look at the dealmakers and hangers-on surrounding convicted serial killer Aileen Wuornos known as ''America's first female serial killer.'

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.
