programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Keep Your Frenemies Close
programme.desc: Wes scores another kill, but when a large group enters their camp, the win creates tension. A desperate Bulent migrates to Seth's watering hole. Seth is open to a partnership but Bulent remains solo and quickly gets a major food win in Seth's backyard.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Third Times the Harm
programme.desc: Wes and team get their third big-game kill, but the victory quickly becomes an unexpected and very dangerous medical situation. A broiling heat wave pushes temperatures to 130 degrees and tests Bulent's ability to survive solo.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Crossbow and a Cross To Bear
programme.desc: Desperate for food, Gwen and Sarah lead the charge to build a crossbow in the bush while Ryan feels the pressure to provide. When new wildlife moves into his camp, Bulent is pushed to the edge. Medics remove a survivalist from the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Banished But Not Broken
programme.desc: With extraction just days away, one survivalist goes against the group, is banished and must try to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah deploy crossbows as they push for one last kill. A deadly snake could end someone's challenge on Day 40.

programme.title: Outback Lockdown: The Duck Hunt
programme.desc: Once more, Ky and Calem's supplies are running short, and they urgently need food. The couple tries to hunt for ducks, which is just as frustrating as tracking the goats. Once they score their prey, they attempt to build an oven.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Queen
programme.desc: In the snake-filled Mississippi swamps, Gabrielle, a former fan survivalist takes on the full 21-day challenge. Gabrielle and Brian are faced with deadly snakes, unrelenting mosquitos, nocturnal predators and a relentless week-long thunderstorm.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Banished But Not Broken
programme.desc: With extraction just days away, one survivalist goes against the group, is banished and must try to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah deploy crossbows as they push for one last kill. A deadly snake could end someone's challenge on Day 40.

programme.title: Outback Lockdown: The Duck Hunt
programme.desc: Once more, Ky and Calem's supplies are running short, and they urgently need food. The couple tries to hunt for ducks, which is just as frustrating as tracking the goats. Once they score their prey, they attempt to build an oven.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Washed Out
programme.desc: An extreme athlete and a book smart bartender tackle an Ecuadorian cloud forest where it rains daily.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Model A Mayhem
programme.desc: Driven by his love of Steve's Diesel Rat Rod, a heavy equipment operator commissions a version for himself; instead, Steve delivers a 'go anywhere' rat rod that can climb mountains as easily as it whips down the highway at 100 mph.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Timber Busting Diamond T
programme.desc: Steve faces an uphill battle meeting his client's demands for a 1930s era truck before acquiring an old friend's family heirloom Diamond T; the work begins to transform a gutless work truck into a mountain-taming monster.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: You Use What You Got
programme.desc: Looking to expand his business, Chad takes on a commission to build a custom 1930s style delivery truck, starting from a discarded 1934 Desoto Airflow coupe.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Cooler Than Dangit
programme.desc: Chad builds a custom bare metal truck to give away at his Rockabilly car show. With the tightest of budgets, the team builds the truck from scratch, and Chad's wild ideas keep them in overdrive.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: To the Moon!
programme.desc: Chad uses a station wagon to create a space-age drag car. The car must be suitable for space travel with wings, in-line seating, and capped off by an 18-inch bubble.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Dirty Hands, Clean Money
programme.desc: The cut rate supercharger Colton brought in threatens to derail to entire build of the custom dragster with bubble top, wings, and inline seating.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: For Kings and Queens
programme.desc: Chad uses a 1935 Hupmobile for an elegant 1930s speedster to debut at a charity golf tournament.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 1
programme.desc: Elon Musk and the greatest minds from SpaceX and NASA are on the verge of making space history. Behind-the-scenes access reveals how these pioneers dream up and test new technology that will make trips to the moon, Mars and beyond commonplace.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future: Part 2
programme.desc: Elon Musk joins great minds from SpaceX and NASA to make space history. Together, the visionary pioneers dream up and test new, cutting-edge tech that will make space travel commonplace.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Chasing Kentucky's Commonwealth
programme.desc: JJ's Arm Drop event in Kentucky continues and the MSO is still struggling to knock out Quinn's hired guns. The stakes are high and if Memphis cannot manage to win the entire event, they'll lose their side bet with Quinn and go home in the red.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: The Best Mistake of My Life
programme.desc: Drama erupts when Colt and Debbie meet Jess' family. Angela refuses to act as a Nigerian woman. Larissa is betrayed by Eric. Elizabeth's family questions Andrei's past. Asuelu throws Kalani under the bus. Paul hopes to win over Karine with a big surprise.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Darcey are Tom are ready to respond. Ed reveals another at home grooming regimen. Rose admits if her sister was ever up to shady business. Yolanda dishes on Williams. Avery watches with her mom, and Ash sets the record straight on moving to the US.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Bon Voyage!

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Two couples may finally meet for the first time. Sean lands in Haiti to potentially meet his love Abby, Paul embarks on a two-day boat trip down the Amazon in hopes that Karine will actually show up, and Darcey encounters airport mishaps in Amsterdam.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Language of Love
programme.desc: Darcey and Jesse spend their first day together in Amsterdam. Paul worries he is getting stood up in Brazil. Cortney prepares to meet a Spanish model she has only ever texted. Sean tries to put his doubts aside while spending time with Abby.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Father's Wrath

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Fight Like a Mother

programme.title: Intervention: Addicted Moms

programme.title: Intervention: Kelly
programme.desc: Kelly, a 27-year-old mother of three, mixes pills and meth to forget the man behind bars who destroyed her childhood.

programme.title: Intervention: Jenna
programme.desc: Jenna had a very strict stepfather who believed in corporal punishment. Now, she steals and deals drugs to support her IV heroin habit.

programme.title: Intervention: Amanda
programme.desc: Amanda has exchanged her dreams of teaching for an alcohol and crack addiction, while her family erupts in anger over her dad's chronic enabling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker doesn't like camping and what the guys say when they're asked for directions. Plus, learn which Joker has a thing for segways.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Eddie heads a peer counseling session that leads the crew to learn more about themselves.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker doesn't like camping and what the guys say when they're asked for directions. Plus, learn which Joker has a thing for segways.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: The Misery Index: This Is Not a Drill!
programme.desc: Contestants trash talk the Tenderloins, Sal's 'moist moment,' and a giant door-opening python.

programme.title: The Misery Index: The Grandma's Special
programme.desc: They may be senior citizens but these awesome ladies sure have lived! Find out what happens when a young bull charges you, and what bodily function made a girl lose 10 years of memories.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Collapsed In and Busted Out
programme.desc: Doctors Dubrow and Nassif head to Arizona to help a woman whose nose collapsed into her own face. In NYC, they meet a college student with an extremely oversized breast, and later ride through Central Park checking up on the HBIC, Tiffany Pollard.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Lip Service
programme.desc: The doctors visit a young mother in Detroit suffering from Tubular Breast Deformation. Later, they consult with a woman in Atlanta whose tumor has left overgrown tissue in her mouth. Before leaving the ATL, they visit past patient Dwight Eubanks.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Lip Service
programme.desc: The doctors visit a young mother in Detroit suffering from Tubular Breast Deformation. Later, they consult with a woman in Atlanta whose tumor has left overgrown tissue in her mouth. Before leaving the ATL, they visit past patient Dwight Eubanks.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Boobs and Tubes
programme.desc: The doctors set out for Vegas to meet a young mother born with Pectus excavatum, and whose underlying breast issues are getting harder to deal with. In Chicago, they consult with a woman born pre-maturely with nasal complications as an adult.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Down on Ds!
programme.desc: The doctors take a gamble in Sin City, helping a young woman whose autoimmune disease may have triggered her deformed breasts.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: The Chronicles of Hernia
programme.desc: Travel to Virginia to meet a young woman with severely deformed breasts. Later, a doctor becomes patient when a serious medical condition arises.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Crooked and Cracked
programme.desc: Paul and Terry take their surgical expertise to patients who have been botched by nature.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: This Little Piggy Went to Surgery
programme.desc: The doctors travel to Texas to meet a female war veteran that was struck by lightning leaving her breasts and body disfigured. Then, they head to South Carolina to consult with a woman who has a misplaced toe on each foot.

programme.title: Botched By Nature: Double Trouble and a Chest Bubble
programme.desc: The Doctors travel to Iowa to see a young father whose infected chest implant is threatening his life. Later, they meet a pair of twins with matching cleft deformities who want to look more identical.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Al Roker tells us what's happening in his neck of the woods.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs
programme.desc: Tiffany 'New York' Pollard is back to beat Breast Implant Illness (BII) and go au naturel, while another former patient with over injected lips returns hoping to restore them to normal and a cosplayer needs the Wizard of Boobs to save the day.

programme.title: Botched: Bums, Boobs, and Baklava
programme.desc: A British bum ambassador is packing on the pounds to get a Kim K inspired butt while Dr. Dubrow helps a mother of nine battle one of the worst cases of capsular contracture he's ever seen.

programme.title: Botched: Face Misfor-CHIN

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Problems
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Sibling Duos
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites teams of chef-siblings to compete in two games that will push their sibling bonds to the limit. First, the teams must decide which items from Guy's sample tables they want to feature in their family dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Budget Games Blowout
programme.desc: The chefs must work with an extreme budget that includes making an elevated sandwich with ingredients that are under $4 but it doesn't get much better for them when they visit the Food Wheel. They will have to make a childhood favourite on a tight budget.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Culinary Saved My Life 2
programme.desc: Four chefs who turned their lives around with cooking battle it out for a chance at a life-changing shopping spree. First, they must flip the ingredients of sweet carrot cake into a lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: California Firefighters

programme.title: The Kitchen: Dog Days of Summer
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing a menu of great recipes just in time for the dog days of summer. Sunny kicks it off with BBQ salmon and easy salad, and Geoffrey makes a refreshing elbow macaroni salad with pine nuts, lemon and fennel.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Upgrades

programme.title: The Kitchen: Al Fresco Feast

programme.title: Chopped: Entree Basket Blues

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confronting the Captain
programme.desc: In Texas, multiple boats are caught over-harvesting oysters and the wardens must handle an unruly captain. Then, when a fox is found dead on private property, an investigation begins to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Family Lies
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Surviving Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Infamous zoo operator Joe Exotic gave one of his last interviews to Animal Planet before his arrest. In this ultimately heartwarming story of the rescue of four big cats from his zoo, we hear from ex-employees, rescue organizations and Joe Exotic himself.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Family Lies
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Last Stand
programme.desc: The largest wildfire in Alaskan history torches the land surrounding Tanana and threatens to devour the village. With state resources spread thin, the villagers must band together to battle the blaze or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Yukon Men: From the Ashes
programme.desc: After Alaska's largest wildfire ravages Tanana, the villagers must adapt their subsistence lifestyles to a new, even harsher reality. Two young homesteaders embark upon a dangerous journey in the hopes of starting a new life on the Cosna.

programme.title: Yukon Men: No Man's Land
programme.desc: After the devastating fire, villagers must modify traditional techniques if they are to survive the winter. A young couple arrives at their remote homestead to discover a life more challenging than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Desperate Measures
programme.desc: Rebuilding after the fire sets everyone back. Charlie needs all his native wisdom to supply his family this winter. Pat Moore gambles big, trading a prize sled dog for a handful of goats. Stan needs James' lumber to help rebuild his cabin.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Drive to Survive
programme.desc: With a brutal winter taking hold, Chris and Jessi struggle to stay warm and in Rampart, Charlie digs deep into his bag of tricks. Stan and Joey build a monster truck to help rebuild Tozi cabin.

programme.title: Yukon Men: The Yukon Way

programme.title: Dateline: The Target
programme.desc: A luxury car salesman receives a visit from a beautiful former client. It turns out that she is not interested in buying a car, but in planning a murder. Andrea Canning reports on her twisted scheme, which shocks even the town's most seasoned detectives.

programme.title: Dateline: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. Two hours after the murder, detectives get a lead from a 911 caller and discover the student's fiancé may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. Two hours after the murder, detectives get a lead from a 911 caller and discover the student's fiancé may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Spiral

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Field Mice
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy take a group of high school CSI Explorer Scouts on a field trip, they embellish their role in solving cases and take their assignments a little bit too far.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: In the Line of Duty
programme.desc: After U.S. Ambassador Nancy Kelly escapes a terrorist attack at the U.S. consulate in Tunisia, Callen and Sam are sent on a secret and dangerous mission to obtain key evidence from the crime scene. Upon their return, Kelly helps provide information.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Black Wind
programme.desc: Callen and Sam go undercover as food truck owners in Mexico to find the source of an anthrax poisoning before it's used to create a bioweapon.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Forest for the Trees
programme.desc: Callen and Sam are kidnapped when they follow an anonymous tip about a missing NSA agent. When the team discovers they are missing they realize it could have been a trap set by terrorists.

programme.title: NCIS: Devil's Triad
programme.desc: Complications arise when the NCIS team discovers a link between a murder victim and the current boyfriend of Gibbs and Agent Fornell's ex-wife. Meanwhile, NSA Analyst Ellie Bishop adjusts to joining the team.

programme.title: NCIS: Homesick
programme.desc: After a mysterious illness strikes children from military families, Gibbs and the team investigate the cause. Meanwhile, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Research Center to determine the strain of illness.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Chain
programme.desc: When a stolen drone is linked to the elusive terrorist Parsa, the team partners with the Department of Defense to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack. Meanwhile, McGee hesitates to ask for time off to attend a black-tie gala.

programme.title: NCIS: Double Back
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the team track down one of his cohorts using evidence from the drone attack. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident.

programme.title: NCIS: Monsters and Men

programme.title: NCIS: Bulletproof

programme.title: Unearthed: Seven Wonders: Episode 5
programme.desc: Investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore seven ancient pyramids from around the world; as experts explore their lost labyrinths and alien relics, they discover unexplained connections between cultures thousands of miles and years apart.

programme.desc: Investigators use cutting-edge tech to explore seven ancient pyramids from around the world; as experts explore their lost labyrinths and alien relics, they discover unexplained connections between cultures thousands of miles and years apart.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Alien Moons: The Next Earth
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino journeys to the alien moons of our solar system, and discovers if these strange worlds could be habitable for life beyond earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Mercury: The Cursed Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Mercury, a deadly and tiny planet that faces constant attacks from the Sun, and which might one day pose a threat to all life on Earth.

programme.title: NASA and SpaceX: Journey to the Future
programme.desc: Elon Musk and experts from SpaceX and NASA are on a mission to revolutionize space exploration. Special inside access reveals how their cutting-edge spacecraft technology will carry humans to the moon, Mars and beyond.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: America Returns to Space
programme.desc: NASA and SpaceX join forces to reach a new milestone in space exploration: the first crewed orbital mission launched from U.S. soil in almost ten years. Coverage from Kennedy Space Center goes behind the scenes to reveal history in the making.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: The Solar System: Alien Origins
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino uncovers the strange and violent birth of our solar system, and reveals how its planets were built from the wreckage bygone alien worlds.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Blood In The Water
programme.desc: When a bag containing body parts washes up on the shore of the lake, the search for missing 10-year old Holly Jones becomes a grisly murder investigation. Police must race to find the perpetrator of this shocking crime before another child is murdered.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: American Monster: By God, That's Enough
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears, a series of text messages from her phone lead police to believe she left on her own. Then, her family uncovers evidence that she may have actually been the victim of foul play.

programme.title: American Monster: By God, That's Enough
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Spreadsheet of Terror
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in the Columbia River, police wonder if she was the victim of an accident or suicide. But the evidence reveals it was the beginning of disturbing murder mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: Two girls take a trip to the mall and never come home. Less than 24 hours later they are found shot to death in a desolate field. An investigation aims to resolve if they were killed by someone they knew or had been victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Suspicion: Murder in Montana
programme.desc: The small farming community of Poplar Montana are stunned at the discovery of the bludgeoned body of 17 year old Kim Nees. But nothing will prepare them for the surprise confession that sends eternal shockwaves through the town.

programme.title: Suspicion: The Killing Oath: Amy Loughren
programme.desc: Amy becomes a nurse so that she can save lives. But when patients in her care start to die in mysterious circumstances she is the only one who can figure out what or who is killing them. Then Amy comes to terrifying conclusion that she might be next.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lost Rider
programme.desc: Autumn Pasquale, 12, loves her new BMX and networks with fellow fans online for tips and tricks to deck it out. But on Homecoming Day 2012, Autumn - and her beloved new bike - go missing. A trail is left behind on Facebook, but where will it lead?

programme.title: Web of Lies: Age, Sex, Location
programme.desc: 13 year-old Kacie Woody meets two male friends via the internet – Scott, from Atlanta; and Dave, a surfing enthusiast from California. But one of these boys is not what he seems, as Kacie's innocent online contacts turn to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Divorced and in Danger
programme.desc: A divorcee turns to the internet for romance and soon meets a sexy entrepreneur. But when she's found brutally murdered in her own home, detectives discover that Sheila was lured into the dark world of S&M.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Death in the Dark
programme.desc: When Audrey Giannotti is found shot to death in her basement apartment her family is horrified. The cluttered crime scene points to a robbery gone wrong, but police suspect someone close to Audrey.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Gone
programme.desc: In Stockton, California, 18-year old Jessyca Arro meets a dark fate. The twists and turns in the case keep this killer one step ahead until one last clue leads detectives to the mother lode.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Thanksgiving Tragedy
programme.desc: When Chris Mader is shot in cold blood on Thanksgiving eve, no one in his Southern Maryland town is in the mood to give thanks. But as the years pass, all investigators run into are dead ends. Finally, an unlikely informant lead police to Chris' killer.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: As 22 year old Kristin Huggins is about to make her artistic debut she suddenly disappears. Soon its clear that the painter from PA had a brush with disaster in nearby NJ. Despite their best efforts, it takes cops quite some time to catch her killer.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: End of an Era
programme.desc: When a beloved local business owner is murdered while minding his store in idyllic Cumberland Gap, TN, no one wants to think that the killer could be one of their own. Could the killer have been a stranger or someone a little closer to home?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed the Music?
programme.desc: When John Tarwacki Sr. discovers the bodies of his son and daughter-in-law, the only story told at the scene is found in the snow. Boot prints reveal the path the killer took, but the search for motive will lead police in a startling direction.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean Lines and Clean Water
programme.desc: A family's three daughters can't get enough of swimming, but their mom's chlorine sensitivity prevents her from joining in on the fun at the community pool. A special ozone system is installed that will allow her to swim.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Piece En Piece
programme.desc: The builders learn some new skills when Mark Bowe buys a cabin with a strange design called Piece en Piece.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dream Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the guys help folks save old log homes, build new ones, and fulfill lifelong dreams restoring antique cabins.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Foldable Cabin
programme.desc: Mark brings one of his biggest ideas to life, a foldable steel cabin. The crew takes the cabin on its maiden voyage and unfolds it for the first time in the boneyard, then they add a timber frame facade and a complete barnwood interior to finish it off.

programme.desc: Father/ son duo, TJ and Mike, go toe-to-toe against Mother/ daughter team, Jess and Hettie.

programme.desc: Style hunters go up against a competitive husband and wife team.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.desc: Stephen Curry's four aunts are visiting from North Carolina and Ayesha Curry is excited to welcome them with a good ol' fashioned Southern barbecue.

programme.desc: A Southwestern brunch includes Texas eggs benedict and cast iron home fries.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: One of bobby's favourite destinations gives him the inspiration for this colorful Mexican meal. Recipes include Mexican corn pancakes and crispy breakfast potatoes with red chile lime hollandaise.

programme.desc: Duff Goldman makes a guest appearance at Michael Symon's favorite Baton Rouge, La. smokehouse that boasts a pork belly hoagie so outrageous it has to be shared. Next up in St. Louis, a big fat Greek burger ignites Michael's cultural soul, and in Austin.

programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Wonder-Bob/ Yay, Earth Day!
programme.desc: When Bob's lucky baseball bat breaks, the pups go on a mission to find a new one in time for the championship game. The pugs help a group of lost moles find their way back home!

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Everybody Wash Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mongoose Cousin Mystery/ The Marble Egg Mystery
programme.desc: Mikku and Chikku's cousins visit Jalpur for a kite festival. Then, when the Prince loses a precious marble gift from the Queen, Mira sets out to find it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pluto and the Pup / Trouble at Floochi's!
programme.desc: Pluto becomes upset with a stowaway pup Mickey unknowingly brings to the garage. The Happy Helpers help when a pair of diamond shoes are swapped at the shoe store for another pair!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Luck Charm/ Teed Off!
programme.desc: When Goofy credits his recent good luck to his Rubber Duck, Daisy decides borrow it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Romeo's Melody/PJ Robot Takes Control

programme.title: PJ Masks: Who Let the Moths In? / Commander Meow
programme.desc: The moths infiltrate HQ, and Gekko won’t admit that he let them in until it is too late. Catboy realizes that a true Cat Explorer puts his team before the discovery.

programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday

programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Goofy Race! / Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks!

programme.desc: Goofy crash-lands on Mars and it's up to the Sensational Six to save him.

programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Gone
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle, otherwise known as 'The Go-Getters,' set out on a case to find Goofy, who has mysteriously gone missing.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Clubhouse
programme.desc: Mickey leaves Donald in charge of the Clubhouse. But he and Goofy accidentally turn a small mess into a big mess, so the whole gang must work together to tidy up in time for a visit from Mother Goose, Clarabelle and her trio of singing chickens.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald
programme.desc: When Pluto's bouncy ball bounces all the way into outer space, Mickey and our friends, led by Space Captain Donald, take a trip to the Moon to retrieve the ball.

programme.title: Chuggington: Wilson's Wag-A-Lagon / The 3 Ways of the Track
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Wild Tire/ Sittin' Kitty
programme.desc: Mickey tries to surprise racing champion Jiminy Johnson with a tire from his first roadster. Minnie and Daisy wind up on a search throughout Hot Dog Hills when the cat they are pet-sitting escapes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Topsy Turvy Tiffin Mystery/ Mystery at the Invention Fair
programme.desc: When Mikku and Chikku accidentally mix up the tiffin delivery, Mira helps set things right. At the Jalpur Invention Fair, an important piece of Dhruv's invention goes missing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Firefighter Pups / Hike Paw
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Take Your Pet to the Vet/ Master and Commander
programme.desc: Doc brings home her class hamster to care for over the weekend and must take her to the veterinarian after she comes down with a cold. Then, Commander Crush gets injured after he ignores Doc's advice to be careful while leaning back in his chair.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Bluey: Backpackers / The Adventure / Copycat
programme.desc: Mum and Dad go on an adventure with the kids; Bluey and Chloe have an imaginary adventure together; Bluey decides to copy Dad.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: Special guest Frankie Grande stops by Coffee, Coffee, Coffee, T@$Hle!gh goes to the school pep rally, All That presents a new way to cool lasagna with the Lasagna Cooler, and Aria finds a new "thing."

programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Someday Your Prince Will Be in Effect

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Someday Your Prince Will Be in Effect

programme.title: Living Single: Legal Briefs

programme.title: Movie: Think Like a Man Too

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams

programme.title: Movie: Love, of Course

programme.title: Movie: Love at Sea

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: Frasier: Junior Agent
programme.desc: Frasier feels the heat when a younger, more aggressive psychiatrist is out-rating him.

programme.title: Frasier: Bully for Martin
programme.desc: Martin is verbally abused at his job and a protective Frasier meddles and complains.

programme.title: Frasier: Mother Load
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne's domestic bliss is ruined by disruptive, interfering and conniving relatives.

programme.title: Frasier: Mother Load
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne's domestic bliss is ruined by disruptive, interfering and conniving relatives.

programme.title: Frasier: Juvenilia

programme.title: Frasier: The Proposal

programme.title: Frasier: Wheels of Fortune
programme.desc: A battle-scarred Frasier is unimpressed when his scheming ex-brother-in-law rolls in.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Blind Dates
programme.desc: Frasier's family and friends set him up with women who will sweep him off his feet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Is Jealous of Girl Singer

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Drafted

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Adagio
programme.desc: Lucy tries to learn the Parisian Apache dance number so she can dance with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Benefit
programme.desc: Lucy tricks Ricky into agreeing to sing and dance with her at a women's club benefit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: Movie: My Boyfriend's Back: Wedding March 5
programme.desc: An up-and-coming wedding planner takes on a partner to help launch her new company. What she doesn't know, is that the best-man from her first job is none other than her own ex-boyfriend who she hasn't seen in years.

programme.title: Movie: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: An author publishes her first novel, but it fails to sell well so she embarks on a book tour. While on tour, she meets a handsome fantasy-author that helps boost her sales, and a romance quickly follows.

programme.title: Movie: Summer in the City

programme.title: Movie: A Summer Romance

programme.title: The Office: Tallahassee
programme.desc: After Dwight and his team arrive in Tallahassee, Dwight competes with his coworkers to impress Sabre special projects president, Nellie Bertram.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours
programme.desc: Andy makes everyone in the office stay late in order to cover for those who went to Florida.

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl

programme.title: The Office: Welcome Party

programme.title: The Office: Angry Andy
programme.desc: Andy returns from his romantic quest to find his manhood in jeopardy. As he and Nellie duke it out over the manager's chair, his co-workers offer advice on how to perform.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: A Bad Seed Grows

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Nice to Meet You, Dr. Isles
programme.desc: When the jeweler to Boston's super cool and famous dies, our investigation leads us to a member of the Isles family we've never met. And that leads us to a secret Maura has been keeping for almost all of her life.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love Taps

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Slam Donks
programme.desc: Tony Yeager and Whitfield roll into town with a group of local Donk-driving racers ready to call JJ out. The familiar foes have a plan to get inside JJ's head by going after the girls and hopefully pull out a win against the MSO.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Reigning for Benji's
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: JJ brings in the country's best small-tire racers, including some big-name foes, to challenge the MSO for a shot at $16,000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: OG Armdrop
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The second round of JJ's small-tire race kicks off with the MSO fighting for a win despite only having half of their team remaining.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: Nashville street racers call out the MSO to see who really runs the streets of Tennessee. Memphis never backs down from a challenge, but with Ziptie out of commission and Heifer having trouble, the team must really step up if they want to win.

programme.title: Farmtruck and Azn Project: Farmtruck and AZN
programme.desc: From their iconic Farmtruck to their unbelievable Gonorail, Farmtruck and AZN have long been known for their crazy builds. Now the guys are taking it to a new level by opening their shop and revealing the crazy new surprises they have up their sleeves.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Burning Rubber Down Under
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN can't say no to an invitation to Summernats, an annual burnout competition in Australian. They ship a new truck to Australia, and get some help to get the truck ready in time to learn the true definition of burning rubber.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: Nashville street racers call out the MSO to see who really runs the streets of Tennessee. Memphis never backs down from a challenge, but with Ziptie out of commission and Heifer having trouble, the team must really step up if they want to win.

programme.title: Farmtruck and Azn Project: Farmtruck and AZN
programme.desc: From their iconic Farmtruck to their unbelievable Gonorail, Farmtruck and AZN have long been known for their crazy builds. Now the guys are taking it to a new level by opening their shop and revealing the crazy new surprises they have up their sleeves.

programme.title: American Chopper: GTO, Bro!

programme.title: American Chopper: Road Warriors
programme.desc: Senior takes a risk and starts a Spartan Race-inspired build before meeting the client, then has to change course to accommodate his requests, while Junior designs a monster trike, but fabrication troubles may mean missing the unveil.

programme.title: American Chopper: Yanks for the Memories
programme.desc: Senior and the OCC guys auction off a military-themed bike to benefit families of fallen soldiers, and Junior designs a western-inspired motorcycle for country music star Clay Walker.

programme.title: American Chopper: Chopper up the Middle
programme.desc: Senior and Junior begin restoring a 1951 Buick, but don't always go by the book. Senior risks everything by moving designs away from their famous choppers. Junior challenges himself to build a streamlined bike for the MLB Network to impress his dad.

programme.title: American Chopper: Teutul Recall
programme.desc: Junior designs a bike inspired by a futuristic big rig. The OCC team builds a military style bike with a sidecar to benefit a foundation for wounded veterans.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior's Moment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Celebrity Call Center: The Shift With the Flashing Moms

programme.title: Celebrity Call Center: The Shift with the Brony

programme.title: Celebrity Call Center: The Shift With the Cheater

programme.title: The Daily Pop
